title: Single-Cell and Spatial Transcriptomics Reframe the Immunosuppressive Microenvironment of Neuroendocrine Neoplasms.
snippet: Neuroendocrine neoplasms (NENs) are a heterogeneous family of tumors that have traditionally been regarded as "immune cold" and largely refractory to PD-1/PD-L1 checkpoint blockade, with notable exceptions such as Merkel cell carcinoma (MCC). The advent of single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) and spatial transcriptomics has enabled unprecedented dissectio...
